stemHtml: A performance class B aeroplane is a...

options.a: jet aircraft with MTOM 5700 kg or more, MOPSC 9 or more.
options.b: jet aircraft with MTOM 5700 kg or less, MOPSC 9 or less.
options.c: propeller aircraft with MTOM 5700 kg or more, MOPSC 9 or more.
options.d: propeller aircraft with MTOM 5700 kg or less, MOPSC 9 or less.
